name: CMS: Human Makes High-Impact Final Decision
description: For high-impact cases, AI provides advice/recommendations only; the final decision is made by qualified staff with documented oversight.
rationale: CMS BR-AI-5: do not rely on AI for final decisions for high-impact cases; AI advises, qualified staff decide with documented oversight.

examples.passes: the CMS AI rule's evidence is present

source: CMS Technical Reference Architecture (TRA) — Artificial Intelligence Guidance (Business Rules BR-AI-1..6 and recommended practices; references OMB M-25-21/M-25-22, NIST AI RMF, HHS AI policy). https://www.cms.gov/tra/Foundation/FD_0080_Foundation_AI_Guidance.htm
